name: silent-failure-scanner
description: Deterministic diff-time detector for swallowed errors & ghost transactions — flags empty catch / except:pass, removed await, dropped non-2xx responses, and narrative-prose comments across TS/JS, Python, C#, and PHP, with a global PreToolUse commit-gate hook that hands findings to Claude to arbitrate

interface.shortDescription: Deterministic diff-time detector for swallowed errors & ghost transactions — flags empty catch / except:pass, removed await, dropped non-2xx responses, and narrative-prose comments across TS/JS, Python, C#, and PHP, with a global PreToolUse commit-gate hook that hands findings to Claude to arbitrate
interface.longDescription: Deterministic diff-time detector for swallowed errors & ghost transactions — flags empty catch / except:pass, removed await, dropped non-2xx responses, and narrative-prose comments across TS/JS, Python, C#, and PHP, with a global PreToolUse commit-gate hook that hands findings to Claude to arbitrate
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the silent-failure-scanner plugin for this task.
